cards.front: What does the law of excluded middle state?
cards.back: All statements are either true or false

cards.front: What is the meaning of the law of non-contradiction?
cards.back: A statement cannot both be true and false at the same time

cards.front: What is the law of excluded middle used for?
cards.back: To determine the truth of a statement by finding its negation

cards.front: What is the purpose of the law of non-contradiction?
cards.back: To avoid asserting contradictory ideas simultaneously

cards.front: What is Deny Law of Contradiction also called?
cards.back: The law of non-contradiction also states that a thing cannot both be and not be at the same time
